GIST - MULTI-ENGINE TEST BUILD
==================================

Build Status: READY FOR TESTING

What's New:
- Google Search support (existing)
- Bing Search support (NEW)
- DuckDuckGo Search support (NEW)

Installation:
1. Open Chrome -> chrome://extensions/
2. Enable "Developer mode" (top right)
3. Click "Load unpacked"
4. Select this dist/ folder

Testing Steps:

TEST 1: Google Search
1. Go to https://www.google.com
2. Search for "artificial intelligence"
3. Look for the summarize button (right side)
4. Click it and verify summary appears

TEST 2: Bing Search
1. Go to https://www.bing.com
2. Search for "machine learning"
3. Look for the summarize button (right side)
4. Click it and verify summary appears

TEST 3: DuckDuckGo Search
1. Go to https://duckduckgo.com
2. Search for "neural networks"
3. Look for the summarize button (right side)
4. Click it and verify summary appears

TEST 4: Keyboard Shortcut
- On any search page, press Ctrl+Shift+S (Cmd+Shift+S on Mac)
- Verify summary appears

Expected Behavior:
- Button appears on all 3 search engines
- Summaries work identically across all engines
- Caching works (repeat searches load instantly)
- All languages and formats work

Prerequisites:
- Valid Google AI API key configured in extension popup
- Internet connection for API calls

Success Criteria:
- Extension loads without errors
- Button visible on all 3 engines
- Summaries generate successfully
- No console errors
- Keyboard shortcut works
